title: Spicy Apple Stir Fry
description: A sweet and spicy stir fry made with crispy vegetables and tender apples. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the apple and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the soy sauce and stir-fry sauce, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the crispy noodles and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
